---
name: New Procedure Preset
about: Propose a new surgical procedure preset
title: "[PROCEDURE] "
labels: new-procedure, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Procedure name**
e.g., mentoplasty, otoplasty, brow lift

**Anatomical description**
What does this procedure change? Which facial structures are affected?

**Proposed landmark indices**
Which MediaPipe Face Mesh landmarks should be used as control handles? (See the [MediaPipe landmark map](https://github.com/google/mediapipe/blob/master/mediapipe/modules/face_geometry/data/canonical_face_model_uv_visualization.png))

**Displacement directions**
For each control handle, what direction and approximate magnitude of displacement?

**References**
Any surgical references, textbooks, or papers that describe the typical tissue movement.
